subject: Smoliv — small round olive-shaped Pokemon with an olive-fruit sprout on its head, sitting in a grassy meadow
description: A small, round, olive-shaped creature sits placidly in a bright grassy meadow. The top of its head bears a miniature olive fruit and stem as a sprout or hat-like feature. Its face is simple and content. The body is a pale cream-green and the surrounding environment is lush green grass under a soft sky. The composition is very centered and minimal — the creature is small, the meadow is wide.
foreground: Smoliv sitting, olive-fruit head sprout visible, round compact body
